name: GIGABYTE AORUS Gen5 14000 SSD 2TB Internal Solid State Drive - PCIe Gen5.0 x4, NVMe 2.0 Interface - Phison PS5026-E26 Controller - 232-layer 3D TLC NAND - DDR4 DRAM Cache - Sequential Read up to 14,500 MB/s - Sequential Write up to 12,700MB/s (AG514K2TB)
description: Ultra-fast 2TB PCIe Gen5 NVMe SSD with DDR4 cache for next-generation gaming and professional workloads.
